context: Tests whether the agent presents query construction incrementally (step-by-step mode), follows the correct filter ordering in each step, and provides usage instructions and customization notes as required by Stage 5a and Stage 6 of the skill.

checklist.name: Incremental steps present
checklist.description: The document shows at least 3 distinct intermediate queries, each building on the previous step (stream selector → line filter → parser → label filter)

checklist.name: Line filter before parser in steps
checklist.description: The step that adds a line filter (|= "error" or similar) appears BEFORE the step that adds the json parser

checklist.name: Each step explained
checklist.description: Each intermediate step is accompanied by a plain-English explanation of what it adds and why

checklist.name: line_format used for output
checklist.description: The final query uses line_format or label_format to surface the error_type and message fields prominently

checklist.name: Filter ordering correct in final query
checklist.description: In the final query, line filter comes before json parser, and label filters (level, component) come after the parser

checklist.name: Two usage methods provided
checklist.description: The document mentions at least two ways to run the query (e.g. Grafana Explore UI and logcli, or HTTP API)

checklist.name: Customization notes present
checklist.description: The document identifies at least one label or value to change when moving from staging to production

checklist.name: Specific stream selector
checklist.description: The final query stream selector includes at least two label matchers
